2605.06353.title: SEQUOR: A Multi-Turn Benchmark for Realistic Constraint Following
2605.06353.paper_summary: In a conversation, a helpful assistant must reliably follow user directives, even as they refine, modify, or contradict earlier requests. Yet most instruction-following benchmarks focus on single-turn or short multi-turn scenarios, leaving open how well models handle long-horizon instruction-following tasks. To bridge this gap, we present SEQUOR, an automatic benchmark for evaluating constraint adherence in long multi-turn conversations. SEQUOR consists of simulated persona-driven interactions built with constraints extracted from real-world conversations. Our results show that even when following a single constraint, instruction-following accuracy consistently decreases as the conversation grows longer, with drops exceeding 11%. This decline becomes larger when models have to follow multiple constraints simultaneously, reducing their accuracy by over 40%. In scenarios where constraints are added or replaced at arbitrary points of the conversation, model accuracy decreases by more than 9%. Taken together, our results reveal that current models still struggle to follow user instructions in multi-turn conversations, and provide a way for better measuring instruction-following capabilities in assistants.
2605.06353.paper_summary_zh: 在對話中，一個有幫助的助手必須可靠地遵循用戶指令，即使這些指令在不斷完善、修改或與早期請求矛盾的情況下也是如此。<lb/>然而，大多數遵循指令的基準集中於單輪或短多輪場景，並未探討模型在長期指令遵循任務中的表現。<lb/>為了填補這一空白，我們提出了SEQUOR，一個用於評估長多輪對話中約束遵循的自動基準。<lb/>SEQUOR由模擬的人物驅動互動組成，這些互動是基於從現實對話中提取的約束構建的。<lb/>我們的結果顯示，即使在遵循單一約束的情況下，隨著對話的延長，指令遵循的準確性也會穩定下降，降幅超過11%。<lb/>當模型需要同時遵循多個約束時，這一下降會更大，準確性減少超過40%。<lb/>在對話的任意點添加或替換約束的情況下，模型的準確性下降超過9%。<lb/>綜合來看，我們的結果顯示當前模型在多輪對話中仍然難以遵循用戶指令，並提供了一種更好地衡量助手指令遵循能力的方法。
2605.06353.author: Beatriz Canaverde et.al.
2605.06353.authors: Beatriz Canaverde, Duarte M. Alves, José Pombal, Giuseppe Attanasio, André F. T. Martins
